products.heading: Our Roller Shutter Types
products.subheading: Every premises has different needs. We offer 6 types of roller shutters for maximum protection of your business.

mildSteel.name: Mild Steel Roller Shutter
mildSteel.description: The most popular choice for factories, warehouses and commercial premises. Made from high-quality steel for maximum strength and durability.
keyPoints: Cost effective — best choice for moderate budgets
Suitable for factories, warehouses & large premises
mildSteel.altText: Mild steel roller shutter for factory and warehouse

aluminium.name: Aluminium Roller Shutter
aluminium.description: Lightweight, rust-resistant and suitable for premises requiring a professional appearance. Ideal for offices, clinics and modern commercial premises.
keyPoints: Lightweight — easy to operate manually or automatically
Rust-resistant & suited for Malaysia's tropical weather
Modern and neat appearance for professional premises
aluminium.altText: Aluminium roller shutter for commercial premises

polycarbonate.name: Polycarbonate Roller Shutter (Transparent)
polycarbonate.description: A combination of security and visibility. Customers can view your display products even after business hours. Suitable for boutiques, showrooms and malls.
keyPoints: 24-hour product display even when shop is closed
Security comparable to steel roller shutters
Natural light entry — save on electricity
polycarbonate.altText: Transparent polycarbonate roller shutter for shop

fireRated.name: Fire-Rated Roller Shutter
fireRated.description: Meets Malaysian fire safety standards. Mandatory for certain buildings under BOMBA regulations. Designed to prevent fire and smoke spread between zones.
keyPoints: Certified & compliant with BOMBA Malaysia standards
Prevents fire & smoke from spreading between zones
Mandatory for certain factories, warehouses & commercial buildings
fireRated.altText: Fire-rated roller shutter for fire safety compliance

grille.name: Grille Roller Shutter
grille.description: Security with ventilation. The grille design allows airflow and visibility while maintaining protection. Top choice for retail shops, supermarkets and retail premises.
keyPoints: Optimal ventilation — suitable for Malaysia's hot climate
Visibility into premises even after operating hours
Popular for convenience stores, supermarkets & food courts
grille.altText: Grille roller shutter for retail shop

motorised.name: Motorised/Automatic Roller Shutter
motorised.description: Open and close with a button or remote control. Suitable for large doors that are frequently opened and closed. Saves time, energy and improves daily operation efficiency.
keyPoints: Remote control or switch — no physical effort
Suitable for large factory & logistics warehouse doors
Upgrade from manual to automatic available
motorised.altText: Motorised automatic roller shutter for warehouse

howItWorks.heading: How We Work
howItWorks.subheading: From enquiry to installation — a simple 4-step process.

steps.title: Contact Us via WhatsApp
steps.description: Tell us your needs — new installation, repair or servicing. Send photos of your location for quick assessment.

steps.title: Site Visit & Quotation
steps.description: Our team will visit your premises for precise measurements. You receive a detailed quote with no hidden charges.

steps.title: Professional Installation
steps.description: Our certified technicians complete the installation according to the agreed schedule. Neat, fast work meeting safety standards.

steps.title: Warranty & After-Sales Support
steps.description: Every installation comes with warranty. Our 24-hour emergency team is always ready for any post-installation issues.

riskProblem.heading: Don't Leave Your Premises Exposed to Risk
riskProblem.subheading: A damaged or missing roller shutter can invite serious problems.

problems.title: Theft & Break-ins
problems.description: Premises without roller shutters or with damaged doors are prime targets for thieves. Losses can reach tens of thousands of ringgit in a single night.

problems.title: Weather Damage
problems.description: Heavy rain, strong winds and tropical storms can damage your stock and equipment if premises are not properly protected.

problems.title: Escalating Repair Costs
problems.description: Unmaintained roller shutters break down faster. Emergency repair costs are far more expensive than regular preventive servicing.

problems.title: BOMBA Compliance Failure
problems.description: Certain premises must have fire-rated roller shutters. Non-compliance can result in fines, closure and safety risks.

riskProblem.solutionCta: Don't wait until it's too late — WhatsApp us now for a free assessment.

midCta.heading: Need a New Roller Shutter or Urgent Repair?
midCta.subheading: Our team is ready to help 24 hours, 7 days a week. Get a free quote within 30 minutes.

locations.heading: Our Service Areas
locations.subheading: Professional roller shutter service in over 50 locations across Malaysia.

items.question: How much does a new roller shutter installation cost?
items.answer: The cost depends on the type of roller shutter, door size and your premises location. Mild steel roller shutters start from a reasonable price for standard sizes. Contact us via WhatsApp for an accurate quote based on your specific needs — assessment and quotation are FREE.

items.question: How long does installation take?
items.answer: Standard installation for one roller shutter unit typically takes 1-2 working days. For projects involving multiple units or special installations like fire-rated, the duration may be longer. Our team will provide an exact schedule after site inspection.

items.question: Do you provide 24-hour emergency repair service?
items.answer: Yes, we operate 24 hours, 7 days a week including public holidays. If your roller shutter breaks at any time — midnight, weekend or festive season — our technicians are ready to arrive at your location as soon as possible. WhatsApp us for immediate response.

items.question: Can manual roller shutters be converted to automatic?
items.answer: Yes! We offer motor upgrade services to convert existing manual roller shutters to motorized systems. This improves operational efficiency especially for large doors that are frequently opened and closed. The upgrade process typically completes within a day.

items.question: What type of roller shutter is suitable for my premises?
items.answer: It depends on your needs. For maximum security — mild steel. For professional appearance and rust resistance — aluminium. For product display — polycarbonate. For BOMBA compliance — fire-rated. Contact us via WhatsApp and our experts will recommend the best type for your premises.

items.question: Do your roller shutters come with warranty?
items.answer: Yes, every installation and repair comes with warranty on materials and workmanship. Warranty period depends on the product type and scope of work. We also offer regular service packages to ensure your roller shutter stays in optimal condition throughout its lifespan.
